MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF PHOENIX ACCOUNTS RECEIVABLE III, LLC'S Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189. (301/PJB)
